targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) as `Sessions` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['type'] = 'session' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `User Messages` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `AI Turns` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) as `Input Tokens` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant' AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) as `Output Tokens` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant' AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT count(*) as `Tool Calls` FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session' AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message' AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  CONCAT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT), ' (input)') as metric,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1, CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(timestamp, 'hour') as time,
  CONCAT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT), ' (output)') as metric,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1, CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT) as model,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) + SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT) as model,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['provider'] AS TEXT) as provider,
  count(*) as turns,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) / count(*)) as avg_input_per_turn,
  ROUND(SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) / count(*)) as avg_output_per_turn
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT), CAST(log_attributes['message']['provider'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

SELECT
  REPLACE(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), '.jsonl', '') as session_id,
  MIN(timestamp) as first_message,
  MAX(timestamp) as last_message,
  SUM(CASE WHEN log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as user_msgs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_turns,
  SUM(CASE WHEN log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'toolResult' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tool_calls,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens,
  SUM(CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message'
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT)
ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

panels.description: Shows how input tokens grow with each AI turn within a session. A steep upward curve indicates context window snowballing — each turn carries the full conversation history, causing exponential cost growth.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  REPLACE(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), '.jsonl', '') as metric,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT) as value
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'assistant'
  AND log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Input Tokens per Turn (Context Window Growth)

panels.description: Shows every conversation turn with its token cost. User messages (green) start a new conversation topic. Subsequent assistant turns show how input tokens grow as context accumulates. Use the session_id filter to drill into a specific session.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp as time,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['role'] AS TEXT) as msg_role,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['model'] AS TEXT) as model,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT) as input_tokens,
  CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT) as output_tokens,
  LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT), 300) as content
FROM otel.otel_logs
WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
  AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message'
  AND log_attributes['message']['role'] IN ('user', 'assistant')
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Conversation Token Detail (per turn)

panels.description: Aggregates token cost per user question. Each row = one user question and all the AI steps it triggered. 'ai_steps' shows how many LLM calls were made for this single question. High total_input with many steps indicates complex tool-use chains (browser, search, etc).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  t.session_id,
  t.start_time,
  t.ai_steps,
  t.total_input,
  t.total_output,
  LEFT(u.content, 200) as user_question
FROM (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    round_id,
    MIN(time) as start_time,
    SUM(CASE WHEN msg_role = 'assistant' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_steps,
    SUM(input_tokens) as total_input,
    SUM(output_tokens) as total_output
  FROM (
    SELECT
      timestamp as time,
      LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
      CAST(log_attributes['message']['role'] AS TEXT) as msg_role,
      CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['input'] AS BIGINT) as input_tokens,
      CAST(log_attributes['message']['usage']['output'] AS BIGINT) as output_tokens,
      SUM(CASE WHEN log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        OVER (PARTITION BY CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT) ORDER BY timestamp) as round_id
    FROM otel.otel_logs
    WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
      AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message'
      AND log_attributes['message']['role'] IN ('user', 'assistant')
      AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  ) sub
  GROUP BY session_id, round_id
) t
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    LEFT(CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT), 8) as session_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (PARTITION BY CAST(log_attributes['log']['file']['name'] AS TEXT) ORDER BY timestamp) as round_id,
    CAST(log_attributes['message']['content'] AS TEXT) as content
  FROM otel.otel_logs
  WHERE log_attributes['log']['source'] = 'session'
    AND log_attributes['type'] = 'message'
    AND log_attributes['message']['role'] = 'user'
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
) u ON t.session_id = u.session_id AND t.round_id = u.round_id
ORDER BY t.total_input DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Per-Question Cost (Round Trip)
